calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2021 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Feb-02-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Kenneth Tse.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Parris Trimble, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Pranetta Sharma, who was placed under oath and testified, and for plaintiff Abhay Sharma, who was not present.
Both Ms. Trimble and Ms. Sharma appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Kenneth Tse.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract and Common Counts was filed on May 5, 2020, and personally on defendant Kenneth Allen on August 24, 2020.
Default as to defendant Kenneth Allen was entered on October 21, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on October 30, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiffs Praneet Sharma and Abhay Sharma, and against the defaulted defendant Kenneth Allen, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $50,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $20,795.11.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $499.50.

Total - $74,119.61.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Dec-29-2020 Continued To Feb-02-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2020 Continued To Mar-24-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
